recalls.Description: Topkay Torch Lighters are being recalled due to serious safety concerns. These black metal lighters, sold in two-packs, lack the necessary child-resistant features, which violates safety standards for multipurpose lighters. This deficiency poses a significant risk of fire and burn injuries, potentially leading to severe harm or even fatalities. Consumers are urged to take immediate action regarding these products.
recalls.Title: Recall of Topkay Torch Lighters Due to Fire and Burn Hazard Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, reach out to Xiyude via email at BCLighterService@outlook.com.

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon from September 2025 to October 2025 for approximately $15.

Distributors.Name: Xinyude Shenzhen Keji Youxiangongsi, dba Xiyude, of China

Hazards.Name: Lighters lack child-resistant mechanisms, creating a fire and burn hazard.

Remedies.Name: Consumers must stop using the lighters and contact Xiyude for a full refund. To dispose of the lighters, pull out the black adjuster knob, then email a photo of the destroyed lighter to BCLighterService@outlook.com for a refund. Follow local waste disposal guidelines for proper disposal.

recalls.metaDescription: Topkay Torch Lighters recalled due to fire hazards. Immediate action required for consumer safety. Contact for refunds and disposal instructions.

recalls.Description: Calico Brands has issued a recall for the Scripto® Premium Torch, which features a four-position adjustable metal nozzle, adjustable flame settings, a hands-free operation lock, and a non-slip rubber grip. This product is also equipped with a metal base that has a black velvet bottom. The UPC code for this item is 0-70257-52226-6, found on the back of the packaging.
recalls.Title: Calico Brands Recalls Scripto Premium Torches Due to Fire and Burn Hazards
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers are urged to stop using the recalled torches immediately and contact Calico Brands at 800-544-4837 from 9 a.m. to 4 p.m. PT, Monday through Friday. They can also reach out via email at premiumtorchrecall@calicobrands.com or visit www.calicobrands.com/premiumtorchrecall.html for further details.

Retailers.Name: Available at Walmart and Home Depot stores nationwide, as well as online at Walmart.com and Homedepot.com from November 2024 through August 2025, priced around $15.

Hazards.Name: Potential fire and burn hazards due to violation of safety standards for multipurpose lighters.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should return the torches to the retailer for a full refund or store credit. Alternatively, they can contact Calico Brands for return instructions and will receive a shipping label and hazmat packaging at no cost.

recalls.metaDescription: Calico Brands recalls Scripto Premium Torches due to serious fire and burn risks. Stop using immediately and contact for refunds.

recalls.Description: Sondiko Butane Torches, model S400, are being recalled due to non-compliance with federal safety regulations for multipurpose lighters. These torches, available in black and silver, lack essential child-resistant features, increasing the risk of serious burn injuries or even fatalities among children. The model number is located on the head of the torch, while the brand name 'Sondiko' is printed on the nozzle. Consumers are urged to take immediate action regarding this recall.
recalls.Title: Huffy Recalls Sondiko Butane Torches Due to Fire and Burn Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: Contact Sondikodirt via email at recalltorch@outlook.com for further assistance.

Manufacturers.Name: Wenzhou Wansheng Smoking Accessories Co. Ltd., of China

Retailers.Name: Available online at www.Amazon.com from October 2023 to March 2025, priced at approximately $15 for a single torch and $26 for a two-pack.

Distributors.Name: Shen Zhen Shi Te Di Ke Dian Zi Shang Wu You Xian Gong Si, dba Sondikodirt, of China

Hazards.Name: Fire and burn hazards due to lack of child-resistant mechanisms

Remedies.Name: Stop using the torches, dispose of them, and reach out to Sondikodirt for return instructions and a full refund.

recalls.metaDescription: Sondiko Butane Torches recalled for fire and burn hazards. Immediate action required for safety and refunds.
